moduleDescription: This module implements a crit bit tree which is an efficient container for a sorted set of strings, or for a sorted mapping of strings. Based on the excellent paper by Adam Langley. (A crit bit tree is a form of radix tree or patricia trie.)

entries.name: CritBitTree
entries.code: CritBitTree[T] = object
entries.description: The crit bit tree can either be used as a mapping from strings to some type T or as a set of strings if T is void.

entries.name: len
entries.code: func len[T](c: CritBitTree[T]): int {.inline.}
entries.description: Returns the number of elements in c in O(1).

entries.name: contains
entries.code: func contains[T](c: CritBitTree[T]; key: string): bool {.inline.}
entries.description: Returns true if c contains the given key.

entries.name: hasKey
entries.code: func hasKey[T](c: CritBitTree[T]; key: string): bool {.inline.}
entries.description: Alias for contains.

entries.name: excl
entries.code: proc excl[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]; key: string)
entries.description:
Removes key (and its associated value) from the set c. If the key does not exist, nothing happens.

See also:

  • incl proc
  • incl proc

entries.name: missingOrExcl
entries.code: proc missingOrExcl[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]; key: string): bool
entries.description:
Returns true if c does not contain the given key. If the key does exist, c.excl(key) is performed.

See also:

  • excl proc
  • containsOrIncl proc
  • containsOrIncl proc

entries.name: containsOrIncl
entries.code: proc containsOrIncl[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]; key: string; val: sink T): bool
entries.description:
Returns true if c contains the given key. If the key does not exist, c[key] = val is performed.

See also:

  • incl proc
  • incl proc
  • containsOrIncl proc
  • missingOrExcl proc

entries.name: containsOrIncl
entries.code:
proc containsOrIncl(c: var CritBitTree[void]; key: string): bool {.raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Returns true if c contains the given key. If the key does not exist, it is inserted into c.

See also:

  • incl proc
  • incl proc
  • containsOrIncl proc
  • missingOrExcl proc

entries.name: inc
entries.code:
proc inc(c: var CritBitTree[int]; key: string; val: int = 1) {.raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Increments c[key] by val.

entries.name: incl
entries.code:
proc incl(c: var CritBitTree[void]; key: string) {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Includes key in c.

See also:

  • excl proc
  • incl proc

entries.name: incl
entries.code: proc incl[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]; key: string; val: sink T)
entries.description:
Inserts key with value val into c.

See also:

  • excl proc
  • incl proc

entries.code: proc `[]=`[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]; key: string; val: sink T)
entries.description:
Alias for incl.

See also:

  • [] proc
  • [] proc

entries.code: func `[]`[T](c: CritBitTree[T]; key: string): lent T {.inline.}
entries.description:
Retrieves the value at c[key]. If key is not in t, the KeyError exception is raised. One can check with hasKey whether the key exists.

See also:

  • [] proc
  • []= proc

entries.code: func `[]`[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]; key: string): var T {.inline.}
entries.description:
Retrieves the value at c[key]. The value can be modified. If key is not in t, the KeyError exception is raised.

See also:

  • [] proc
  • []= proc

entries.name: keys
entries.code: iterator keys[T](c: CritBitTree[T]): string
entries.description: Yields all keys in lexicographical order.

entries.name: values
entries.code: iterator values[T](c: CritBitTree[T]): lent T
entries.description:
Yields all values of c in the lexicographical order of the corresponding keys.

See also:

  • mvalues iterator

entries.name: mvalues
entries.code: iterator mvalues[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]): var T
entries.description:
Yields all values of c in the lexicographical order of the corresponding keys. The values can be modified.

See also:

  • values iterator

entries.name: items
entries.code: iterator items[T](c: CritBitTree[T]): string
entries.description: Alias for keys.

entries.name: pairs
entries.code: iterator pairs[T](c: CritBitTree[T]): tuple[key: string, val: T]
entries.description:
Yields all (key, value)-pairs of c in the lexicographical order of the corresponding keys.

See also:

  • mpairs iterator

entries.name: mpairs
entries.code: iterator mpairs[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]): tuple[key: string, val: var T]
entries.description:
Yields all (key, value)-pairs of c in the lexicographical order of the corresponding keys. The yielded values can be modified.

See also:

  • pairs iterator

entries.name: keysWithPrefix
entries.code: iterator keysWithPrefix[T](c: CritBitTree[T]; prefix: string): string
entries.description: Yields all keys starting with prefix.

entries.name: valuesWithPrefix
entries.code: iterator valuesWithPrefix[T](c: CritBitTree[T]; prefix: string): lent T
entries.description:
Yields all values of c starting with prefix of the corresponding keys.

See also:

  • mvaluesWithPrefix iterator

entries.name: mvaluesWithPrefix
entries.code: iterator mvaluesWithPrefix[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]; prefix: string): var T
entries.description:
Yields all values of c starting with prefix of the corresponding keys. The values can be modified.

See also:

  • valuesWithPrefix iterator

entries.name: itemsWithPrefix
entries.code: iterator itemsWithPrefix[T](c: CritBitTree[T]; prefix: string): string
entries.description: Alias for keysWithPrefix.

entries.name: pairsWithPrefix
entries.code:
iterator pairsWithPrefix[T](c: CritBitTree[T]; prefix: string): tuple[
    key: string, val: T]
entries.description:
Yields all (key, value)-pairs of c starting with prefix.

See also:

  • mpairsWithPrefix iterator

entries.name: mpairsWithPrefix
entries.code:
iterator mpairsWithPrefix[T](c: var CritBitTree[T]; prefix: string): tuple[
    key: string, val: var T]
entries.description:
Yields all (key, value)-pairs of c starting with prefix. The yielded values can be modified.

See also:

  • pairsWithPrefix iterator

entries.code: func `$`[T](c: CritBitTree[T]): string
entries.description: Turns c into a string representation.

entries.name: commonPrefixLen
entries.code: func commonPrefixLen[T](c: CritBitTree[T]): int {.inline.}
entries.description: Returns the length of the longest common prefix of all keys in c. If c is empty, returns 0.

entries.name: toCritBitTree
entries.code: proc toCritBitTree[T](pairs: sink openArray[(string, T)]): CritBitTree[T]
entries.description: Creates a new CritBitTree that contains the given pairs.

entries.name: toCritBitTree
entries.code:
proc toCritBitTree(items: sink openArray[string]): CritBitTree[void] {.
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Creates a new CritBitTree that contains the given items.
